post.description: Authenticate user with email/phone and password
Exchange a valid refresh token for a new token pair
Register a new user and return tokens

get.description: Get the current active load for the authenticated carrier (accepted, in_transit, or completed)

post.description: Register a GPS location point for an in-transit load (MVP REST alternative to WebSocket)
Carrier is driving to pickup location (accepted → picking_up)
Start a load (by carrier, transitions to in-transit)

put.description: Update the profile of the authenticated user

post.description: Register or update a device for push notifications

get.description: Upgrades HTTP connection to a full-duplex WebSocket.
